title: Beaches in Saint-Raphael
description: Pleasant sandy and pebble beaches

title: Citadelle de Saint-Tropez
description: Fortress in Saint-Tropez

title: Calanque de Santa Lucia
description: On this path along the sea you can enjoy a beautiful walk, you will find spectacular seaside sceneries and peaceful small beaches in little secluded bays

title: Château d'If
description: Château d'If is a fortress located on an island located approximately 1.5 kilometers from Marseille, a large beautiful city with a rich long history. Château d'If is famous owing to Alexandre Dumas's adventure novel The Count of Monte Cristo.

title: Saint-Raphael Archaeological museum
description: Museum of local archeology. You can walk upstairs to the top of a tower and see a spectacular view of surroundings

title: Private Cars Collection of Prince of Monaco
description: Museum of cars

title: Oceanographic Museum of Monaco
description: Oceanographic museum with a lot of aquariums. On the top of the museum you can enjoy a spectacular view of Monaco and the sea

title: Cave of Baume Obscure
description: If you like exploring caves, then you will enjoy approximately 500 meters of an underground walk through tunnels, cave halls with stalactites and stalagmites.

title: Point View Monaco
description: A beautiful panorama of the coast around Monaco and Monaco itself

title: Beach in Agay
description: Beautiful beaches in Agay

title: Beach in Cannes
description: Sandy beaches in Cannes

title: Beach in Dramont
description: Pebble beach in Dramont

title: Walking path in Dramont
description: Walking path along the sea in Dramont

title: Park Aurelien
description: Park with ancient roman ruins

title: Beaches in Frejus
description: Pleasant wide sandy beaches in Frejus

title: Botanical garden in Sainte-Maxime
description: Beautiful botanical garden in Sainte-Maxime

description: Museum of the Decorative Arts, Fashion and Ceramics

title: Lake Saint-Cassien
description: Lake Saint-Cassien
